prompt: Review the scripts/linux/optimize-claude.sh file for security vulnerabilities, data loss risks, and unsafe operations. Use an adversarial approach - actively look for what could go wrong. Focus on: 1) In-place file modifications without backups, 2) Shell injection risks, 3) Path traversal bypasses, 4) Command execution in 'safe' whitelists, 5) Race conditions with temp files. Output a structured report with line-numbered findings, risk levels, and specific evidence from the code.

assertions.name: finds_in_place_resize_risk
assertions.description: Identifies the in-place image resize data loss risk (line ~1042)

assertions.name: finds_npm_run_security_issue
assertions.description: Identifies npm run in auto-approve whitelist as dangerous

assertions.name: finds_path_traversal_bypass
assertions.description: Identifies file guard regex can be bypassed with path traversal
